heading: Compensation of Financial Clerk of Senate
label: 6536 Compensation of Financial Clerk of Senate
text: The Financial Clerk of the Senate may be paid at a maximum annual rate of compensation not to exceed $39,000.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 64a–1 of this title
